TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kin_lwan, title = Kin_lwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kin_lwan} }

S.FORM: alang Kin lwan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 54 buwan, 183 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 172 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kin lwan hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Kin lwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kin lwan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Kin lwan hya' ga llyung. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat pqwasan biru. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat kyokay. qalang Kin lwan ungat hasisyo. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. tay mkraya' na Kin lwan hya' ga Hbun-tunan. tay mkyahu' na Kin lwan hya' ga Yuluw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kin lwan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 54 buwan, 183 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 172 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kin lwan hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Kin lwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kin lwan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Kin lwan hya' ga llyung. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat pqwasan biru. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat kyokay. qalang Kin lwan ungat hasisyo. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Kin lwan ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. tay mkraya' na Kin lwan hya' ga Hbun-tunan. tay mkyahu' na Kin lwan hya' ga Yuluw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kin lwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kin lwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na kin lwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kin lwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na kin lwan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. qalaŋ kin lwan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ kin lwan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. qalaŋ kin lwan uŋat ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ kin lwan ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ kin lwan ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ kin lwan ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. taj mkrajaʔ na kin lwan ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-tunan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kin lwan ħjaʔ ɣa juluw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
